evals.prompt: I'm launching a craft brewery in Bristol and need a website with e-commerce for merch, a taproom booking system, and a blog for beer culture content. I've got a logo and some brand colours but nothing else built yet. I want to set up an agent company for this project. I'm thinking maybe a design agent, a content agent, and a web dev agent but I'm not sure if that's right.
evals.expected_output: A complete agent-company/ folder with COMPANY.md and PERSONA.md files. Should challenge the 3-agent suggestion and address SEO/visibility.
expectations: COMPANY.md exists and contains an ownership map table with columns for Concern, Owner, and Notes
COMPANY.md contains a conflict resolution table addressing boundary edges between agents
Each agent has a PERSONA.md containing all 7 sections: Identity, Voice, Analytical Frameworks, Source of Truth, Boundaries, Failure Modes, Standing Instructions
Each agent's Boundaries section includes Owns, Does not own, and Hands off to subsections
No two agents claim ownership of the same concern in the ownership map
Each agent has knowledge/ and mailbox/ directories created
The skill questions or challenges the user's initial 3-agent suggestion rather than blindly accepting it
An SEO or visibility concern is explicitly addressed — either as its own agent or assigned to a specific agent in the ownership map
The transcript shows evidence of running a quality gate checklist before presenting the design
Each PERSONA.md Voice section includes at least 2 example sentences with specific, realistic content (not placeholder text)
Each PERSONA.md Analytical Frameworks section includes at least 2 named domain-specific frameworks with concrete criteria
Each PERSONA.md Failure Modes section contains at least 3 role-specific failure modes (not generic advice like 'don't be vague')
Each PERSONA.md Standing Instructions includes an instruction about verifying claims against current sources before giving opinions, with URL citation
Each PERSONA.md Failure Modes includes a failure mode about relying on training data instead of researching current sources
The ownership map in COMPANY.md is consistent with the Owns sections in each PERSONA.md — no discrepancies

evals.prompt: I run a small music production studio and I want agents to help me manage the business side — client outreach, social media, invoicing, and project management. I don't need anything technical or code-related, just the business operations. Set up an agent company for this.
evals.expected_output: A complete agent-company/ folder for a non-technical business operations team. No web/design/tech agents.
expectations: COMPANY.md exists and contains an ownership map table with columns for Concern, Owner, and Notes
COMPANY.md contains a conflict resolution table addressing boundary edges between agents
Each agent has a PERSONA.md containing all 7 sections: Identity, Voice, Analytical Frameworks, Source of Truth, Boundaries, Failure Modes, Standing Instructions
Each agent's Boundaries section includes Owns, Does not own, and Hands off to subsections
No two agents claim ownership of the same concern in the ownership map
Each agent has knowledge/ and mailbox/ directories created
No web development, design, or technical coding agent is created — the user explicitly said non-technical
Agent analytical frameworks reference practical creative-industry or small-business methods, not generic corporate strategies
The transcript shows evidence of running a quality gate checklist before presenting the design
Each PERSONA.md Voice section includes at least 2 example sentences with specific, realistic content relevant to a music production studio
Each PERSONA.md Analytical Frameworks section includes at least 2 named domain-specific frameworks with concrete criteria
Each PERSONA.md Failure Modes section contains at least 3 role-specific failure modes (not generic advice)
Each PERSONA.md Standing Instructions includes an instruction about verifying claims against current sources before giving opinions, with URL citation
Each PERSONA.md Failure Modes includes a failure mode about relying on training data instead of researching current sources
The ownership map in COMPANY.md is consistent with the Owns sections in each PERSONA.md — no discrepancies

evals.prompt: Here's my project brief: we're building a SaaS platform for independent restaurants to manage their online presence — menus, reviews, local SEO, social media scheduling. The codebase already exists with a Next.js frontend in src/app/, Tailwind config at tailwind.config.ts, and a Supabase backend. I need an agent company that covers product strategy, frontend design, content for the marketing site, and developer experience. Maybe 6 agents? I want them properly tested and ready to go.
evals.expected_output: A complete agent-company/ folder. Should reference real codebase paths and evaluate whether 6 agents is right.
expectations: COMPANY.md exists and contains an ownership map table with columns for Concern, Owner, and Notes
COMPANY.md contains a conflict resolution table addressing boundary edges between agents
Each agent has a PERSONA.md containing all 7 sections: Identity, Voice, Analytical Frameworks, Source of Truth, Boundaries, Failure Modes, Standing Instructions
Each agent's Boundaries section includes Owns, Does not own, and Hands off to subsections
No two agents claim ownership of the same concern in the ownership map
Each agent has knowledge/ and mailbox/ directories created
At least one agent's Source of Truth table references actual codebase paths like src/app/, tailwind.config.ts, or supabase/
The skill evaluates whether 6 agents is the right number rather than blindly accepting the user's suggestion
The transcript shows evidence of running a quality gate checklist before presenting the design
Each PERSONA.md Voice section includes at least 2 example sentences with specific, realistic content
Each PERSONA.md Analytical Frameworks section includes at least 2 named domain-specific frameworks with concrete criteria
Each PERSONA.md Failure Modes section contains at least 3 role-specific failure modes (not generic advice)
Each PERSONA.md Standing Instructions includes an instruction about verifying claims against current sources before giving opinions, with URL citation
Each PERSONA.md Failure Modes includes a failure mode about relying on training data instead of researching current sources
The ownership map in COMPANY.md is consistent with the Owns sections in each PERSONA.md — no discrepancies
